rough_body: hey team, i'm Aster. people keep uploading my stuff w/out permission. the tracks include Skyline and Midnight Echoes, and maybe Golden Hour Live. can you remove the links? thanks. reply to takedown@astervale.co
Hi, this is about some unauthorized copies of my music. Titles: Skyline (USABC2300001) + Midnight Echos. I'm the rights holder via Aster Vale Music. please act fast (48 hrs).
Hello – fan uploads of my tracks are popping up. I need them removed asap per your policy. See: Skyline (US-ABC-23-00001), Golden Hour Live. You can call me at +1 323 555 0199. thx.
